title: thelycrania purpusii
side_effects: Thelycrania purpusii can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing allergic reactions, skin irritation, and gastrointestinal problems. Excessive consumption of the plant's extracts can lead to headaches, dizziness, and nausea. In severe cases, thelycrania purpusii can cause kidney and liver damage if ingested in large quantities over an extended period. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using thelycrania purpusii for medicinal purposes.
